# Final Review Proposal

## Summary

Reviewed the full diff in this run; only `.ralph-burning/projects/kvc/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/kvc/run.json` changed, and both are review-run metadata records (journal entries/stage resolution snapshot), not implementation code for bootstrap/project-create flow. No correctness/safety/robustness issues were identified in changed functional code paths.

## Amendments

None.
